questions.question: Why can AI models learn incorrect patterns?
options: Because training data may contain errors or biases
Because AI models stop using data after training
Because AI models only use images

questions.question: Why can AI responses sound correct even when they are wrong?
options: Because AI systems truly understand the world
Because AI models predict patterns in language
Because AI systems check all facts with experts
Because AI models only repeat memorized sentences

questions.question: What can happen when a user question lacks context?
options: The AI may misunderstand the request

questions.question: What is hallucination in AI?
options: The AI invents information that is not true
The AI translates text into another language
The AI stores too much data
